raw_consumer_statement:
Purchased groceries from XXXX and they go through XXXX last year. 
The order as mis-delivered. The photos of the delivery are not my home, clearly not showing any defnitive markings of the house number, yet XXXX is awful about this type of thing and only send automated replies. I filed a complaint with XXXX and they supported me in disputing the charge. They said XXXX has done this before and the best and quickest way to get my money back was to dispute with my bank. 
so i did, and nothing happened. They closed the case. 

I do not think that any human beings actually work these dispute cases since if they did, they could easily see the photo discrepency with the delivery address and wherever the order was actually delivered. 

I would appreciate having a bank support me when these occasional issues arise. 
Since I did give CITI everything they needed to dispute my case, yet nothing happened, I am hoping this wlil help my cause This is almost {$500.00} in food. 

I am attaching the dispute and original order
